message:
refactor(tests): remove unused imports from archive commands tests

Remove unused imports from test_cli_archive_commands.py:
- ensure_schema, get_session from mcp_agent_mail.db
- Agent, Message, MessageRecipient, Project from mcp_agent_mail.models

These imports were left over and never used in the test file.
